reviews.comment: Absolutely amazing food! The pad thai was the best I've ever had. Service was excellent and the ambiance was perfect for a date night. Will definitely come back!
Great food and friendly staff. The only reason I'm not giving 5 stars is because the wait time was a bit long. But the quality made up for it!
Best sushi in town! Fresh ingredients and beautiful presentation. The chef's special was outstanding.
Food was decent but nothing special. Expected more based on the reviews. Portion sizes could be bigger for the price.
Incredible experience from start to finish. The noodle soup was perfectly seasoned and the spring rolls were crispy and delicious!
Lovely restaurant with a cozy atmosphere. The grilled chicken was juicy and flavorful. Would recommend for family dinners.
Disappointed with my visit. The food arrived cold and the server seemed overwhelmed. Hope they improve their service.
Hidden gem! The seafood platter was phenomenal. Fresh, well-cooked, and beautifully plated. Staff was super attentive.
Solid choice for Asian cuisine. The fried rice was excellent and the portions are generous. Fair prices too!
Perfect dinner spot! Everything we ordered was delicious. The dessert menu is also worth exploring. Highly recommend the mango sticky rice!
Average experience. Food was okay but I've had better elsewhere. The location is convenient though.
Celebrated my birthday here and it was wonderful! The staff brought out a complimentary dessert. Such a thoughtful touch!
